case_title: JOSE DE LA CRUZ et al VS. AN WEIFEN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WEIFEN, AN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DE LA CRUZ, JOSE SCHACHT, STACI AS TO DEFENDANT WEIFEN, AN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO STACI SCHACHT BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-03-2014 AT 10:00 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---KENNETH WRIGHT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---HELENA NONG. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TAMARA GOULDEN--CLAIM REP--STATE FARM INSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.
